name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the EAM/AIM platform

labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

## Affected Standards

<!-- Select all standards this feature relates to -->

- [ ] **ISO 55000** - Asset Management
- [ ] **ISO 55001** - Asset Management Systems Requirements
- [ ] **ISO 55002** - Asset Management Systems Guidelines
- [ ] **ISO 19650** - BIM / Information Management
- [ ] **ISO 14224** - Reliability & Maintenance Data
- [ ] **ISO 13374** - Condition Monitoring
- [ ] **ISO 17359** - Condition Monitoring Guidelines
- [ ] **IEC 62264** - Enterprise-Control Integration
- [ ] **MIMOSA** - Open Standards for O&M
- [ ] **RCM (MSG-3 / SAE JA1011)** - Reliability-Centered Maintenance
- [ ] None / Not Applicable

## Priority

<!-- Select one -->

- [ ] 🔴 Critical - Blocking adoption or compliance
- [ ] 🟠 High - Significant business value
- [ ] 🟡 Medium - Nice to have, improves workflow
- [ ] 🟢 Low - Minor improvement

## Affected Module

<!-- Select the primary module(s) this feature would impact -->

- [ ] Asset Management (EAM)
- [ ] Asset Information Management (AIM)
- [ ] Reliability-Centered Maintenance (RCM)
- [ ] Work Order Management
- [ ] Preventive Maintenance
- [ ] Predictive Maintenance / IoT
- [ ] Inventory & Spare Parts
- [ ] Financial / Cost Tracking
- [ ] Reporting & Analytics
- [ ] API / Integrations
- [ ] Web UI / UX
- [ ] Mobile
- [ ] Multi-tenant Administration
